name: Lemon Cream Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
3. Alternately add dry ingredients with milk and water, blending well.
4. Fold in nuts and lemon rind.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9x5x3 inch loaf pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for about 1 hour or until golden brown.
7. Dissolve sugar and lemon juice together.
8. Drizzle over the hot loaf.
9. Let stand in the pan for 30 minutes.
10. Turn out onto a cake rack.
